algorithm_contract.description: The update must describe delete-relaxation heuristic estimation and greedy selection.

modality_boundary_note: Only model_facing is intended for model prompts; gold_scoring_metadata is evaluator-only.

model_facing.algorithm_definition: Fast Forward: compute a delete-relaxation heuristic by ignoring negative effects, estimate distance to the goal, and greedily expand the most promising state.

language_input.natural_language_goal: Achieve these Blocksworld goal atoms: on(a,b).

output_format.internal_state_update: one-step planner-state update for the requested algorithm

model_facing.system: You are executing fast_forward on one Blocksworld task.
model_facing.task_instruction: Execute the next step of fast_forward and respond only with JSON.
